title: problem about spliceColumns
author: ray2031
body: there is a problem about spliceColumns function.the line 209 in this file worksheets.js .the 'r' is not array. so it can't be splice

comments.author: daniele-orlando
comments.body:
Version: **1.11.0**

I'm trying to remove the trailing empty columns with `.spliceColumns()`, but it does not work.

Is it a limitation of the Excel file to have at least 5 columns?
